fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: id
fields.label: Section ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for this section (HTML ID)

fields.name: number
fields.label: Number of FAQs to be rendered

fields.name: path-filter
fields.label: Path Filter
fields.description: The Path Filter decides where the search looks on the website. If a path is provided, it will search only within that page and its sub-pages. If left as the default, it searches the entire website.
